description: Tuolin Agent marketplace for Codex, including the local knowledge base agent, controlled LinkedIn campaign workflows, and quartz-fiber-tape video creation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Tuolin business agents for knowledge base, LinkedIn, and video creation workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex-installed Tuolin business agent marketplace. Includes the local knowledge-base Agent, controlled LinkedIn 30-day campaign workflows, and the quartz-fiber-tape video creation workflow. Video creation is an application-layer Agent that uses the generated Agent interface only, confirms language/version/platform/creative direction before planning, and outputs Dreamina video shot plans plus safe manual submission handoff files.
